description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky representation of a giraffe, featuring a tall, rectangular neck and a compact, cubic body. Its surface is primarily a pale yellow, adorned with irregular brown patches that mimic the natural patterning of a giraffe's coat. The head is square with a protruding rectangular snout, two small blocky ossicones on top, and simple, dark eyes. The legs are straight and rectangular, matching the geometric style of the rest of the body. The tail is short and stubby, blending into the rear of the body. The overall appearance is playful and simplified, reminiscent of voxel art or digital toy figures.
description: A blocky, stylized giraffe with a tall rectangular neck, pale yellow body, and brown patches in a geometric, toy-like form.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the giraffe's face, ossicones, and the full length of its neck with brown patches visible on the chest and legs.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the giraffe's snout, both ossicones, and the right side's brown patches.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the back of the neck, body, and tail, with brown patches mostly on the back and left leg.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the back and right side, with brown patches on the body and right hind leg.
